EmailTemplate.description: 员工报名成功 - 短信
EmailTemplate.name: Exhibition Registration Success SMS
EmailTemplate.subject: Your info is received
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Internal_Registration__c.Name}，
您的{!Internal_Registration__c.Exhibition_Id__c}参加申请已收到!
您的申请审核通过后，方可预订酒店、接机、会议室等资源（若有）。请留意后续邮件、短信通知。
Your request is well received.
After approved, you could reserve a hotel, meeting room and shuttle bus. Please watch for updates of approval.
If you have any questions, do not hesitate to reach out to us via email at wangfang19@hisense.com
The exhibition coordination team of the {!Internal_Registration__c.Exhibition_Name_EN__c}
